concept_overview.title: What is SELECT DISTINCT?
concept_overview.bodyMarkdown:
SELECT DISTINCT focuses on this idea: Removing duplicate rows from results.

A good starting point is to say the requirement in plain language before writing SQL.

### Learning goals
- use DISTINCT to eliminate duplicates
- understand when to use DISTINCT

goal_one.title: use DISTINCT to eliminate duplicates
goal_one.bodyMarkdown:
use DISTINCT to eliminate duplicates.

When practicing SELECT DISTINCT, start with a focused example and verify the result carefully.

goal_two.title: understand when to use DISTINCT
goal_two.bodyMarkdown:
understand when to use DISTINCT.

Use the topic idea to explain what the query is doing in plain English.

practice_note.title: How to practice SELECT DISTINCT
practice_note.bodyMarkdown:
Read the requirement, predict the result, run the query, and verify whether the output really answers the question.

That habit is especially important for SELECT DISTINCT.

module1_select_distinct_core_concept.title: Core idea: SELECT DISTINCT
module1_select_distinct_core_concept.prompt: What is the best description of SELECT DISTINCT?

help.hint_1: Look for the option that matches the main concept directly.
help.hint_2: Ignore answers that describe unrelated SQL behavior.

module1_select_distinct_core_concept.hint: Match the answer to the topic summary.

options.b: It permanently removes columns from a table.

module1_select_distinct_true_statements.title: True statements about SELECT DISTINCT
module1_select_distinct_true_statements.prompt: Select all true statements about SELECT DISTINCT.

help.hint_1: Pick statements that align with the topic summary and objectives.
help.hint_2: Reject statements that clearly describe unrelated SQL ideas.

module1_select_distinct_true_statements.hint: Use the summary and objectives as your guide.

options.c: It is unrelated to retrieving data from tables.
options.d: It only works after deleting rows.
